name: PH - Miss Behave (2026) (PH)
plot: When their scandalous private content spreads across campus, a group of smart girls band together and plot revenge against the male students whom they believe leaked their nude photos.
cast: Alexa Ilacad, Xyriel Manabat, Reign Parani, Rans Rifol, Andi Abaya, JC Alcantara, Akira Morishita, Raven Rigor

name: PH - He's Into Her (2021) (PH)
plot: A coming-of-age story that tackles what the young and the young at heart must be brave enough to fight for: family, friendship, and love.
cast: Donny Pangilinan, Belle Mariano, Kaori Oinuma, Jeremiah Lisbo, Vivoree Esclito, Joao Constancia, Criza Taa, Gello Marquez

name: PH - Araw Gabi (2018) (PH)
cast: JM de Guzman, Barbie Imperial, Vina Morales, Ara Mina, RK Bagatsing, Vina Morales, Raymond Bagatsing, Ivana Alawi

name: PH - Queen Mantis (2025) (KR)
plot: Cha Su-yeol, a police officer who has long despised his mother, the notorious 'Mantis' serial killer, must reluctantly turn to her for help when a copycat killer emerges.
cast: Ko Hyun-jung, Jang Dong-yoon, Cho Seong-ha, Lee El, Kim Bo-ra, Lee Hwang-eui, Kim Min-ho, Kim Tae-jeong

name: PH - The Broken Marriage Vow (2022) (PH)
plot: A seemingly perfect home gets shattered by broken trust and infidelity, bringing forth catastrophic effects into the lives of the couple, their son, and everyone else involved. This is a story about a woman scorned.
cast: Jodi Sta. Maria, Zanjoe Marudo, Sue Ramirez, Zaijian Jaranilla, Jane Oineza, Joem Bascon, Art Acuña

name: PH - A Love to Last (2017) (PH)
plot: Sometimes we find love in the most unexpected places, and it comes in the most unexpected moment. Can two broken hearts make their love last?
cast: Bea Alonzo, Ian Veneracion, Iza Calzado, Enchong Dee, Julia Barretto, Marc Santiago

name: PH - How to Move On in 30 Days (2022) (PH)
plot: Unceremoniously dumped by her influencer boyfriend, a young and dedicated talent handler vows to move on from him within 30 days. She chronicles her journey in her own vlog and later hires a fake boyfriend in hopes of fully healing from heartbreak.
cast: Maris Racal, Carlo Aquino, Albie Casiño, Jai Agpangan, Sachzna Laparan, Kyo Quijano, John Lapus, Sherry Lara

name: PH - And I Love You So (2015) (PH)
plot: Will Trixie and Joanna learn to accept their new family and treat each as sisters, or will their rivalry destroy their only chance at having a complete and loving family?

name: Cruz vs. Cruz (2025) (PH)
plot: Manuel's family starts to be broken apart when he commits adultery while working overseas.
cast: Vina Morales, Gladys Reyes, Neil Ryan Sese, Kristoffer Martin, Lexi Gonzales, Pancho Magno, Elijah Alejo, Caprice Cayetano

name: PH - House of Lies (2026) (PH)
plot: Marj and Thea are two women determined to secure their dream life and protect their families. But ambition, deceit, and betrayal weave a dangerous web, ultimately building a house of lies.

name: PH - Bolera (2022) (PH)
cast: Kylie Padilla, Rayver Cruz, Jak Roberto, Jaclyn Jose, Gardo Versoza, Joey Marquez, David Remo, Via Veloso

name: PH - The Gift (2019)
plot: The story follows Joseph (Sep), a high-spirited and hardworking vendor in the bustling district of Divisoria. Despite being abandoned by his biological mother and raised by his adoptive family, Sep maintains a positive outlook on life.
cast: Alden Richards, Jean Garcia, Jo Berry, Elizabeth Oropesa, Mikee Quintos, Martin del Rosario, and Christian Vasquez

name: PH - S.O.C.O. (2025) (PH)
plot: S.O.C.O. (Scene of the Crime Operatives) is a Philippine reality television series by ABS-CBN that aims to find answers to serious crimes with the help of local police and forensic investigators. It is hosted by ABS-CBN reporter Gus Abelgas. It is aired currently in the Philippines via ABS-CBN. On July 14, 2012 were moved to an earlier day and timeslot every Saturday at 4:00-4:45 PM, after Showbiz Inside Report.

name: PH - Onanay (2018) (PH)
plot: Sisters Maila and Natalie have different approach to their mother, Onay who has Achondroplasia. Maila is a nice and attentive daughter, while Nataile is arrogant and disobedient. Besides their different upbringing, they have a different father as well.
cast: Jo Berry, Kate Valdez, Cherie Gil, Nora Aunor, Jenzel Angeles

name: PH - Love of My Life (2020) (PH)
plot: Three strong women, who are also mothers, endure many difficulties and sacrifice everything for the love of their lives.
cast: Coney Reyes, Carla Abellana, Mikael Daez, Rhian Ramos, Samantha Lopez, Maey Bautista, Raphael Landicho, Geleen Eugenio

name: PH - The Master Cutter (2026) (US)
plot: A skilled tailor in Baclaran hides a secret past as a special forces scout ranger; his life is turned upside down when he protects a street-smart girl who unexpectedly becomes his next target.
cast: Dingdong Dantes, Max Collins, Sienna Stevens, Shuvee Etrata, and Charlie Fleming.

name: PH - Sleep with Me (2022) (PH)
plot: Harry, an overnight radio DJ who is in a wheelchair, and her crush Luna, who suffers from a sleeping condition, navigate their respective disorders and issues from past relationships as they start their romance.
cast: Lovi Poe, Janine Gutierrez, Kerwin King, Nour Hooshmand, Gelai Penales, Enzo Almario, Reign Parani, Katte Sabate

name: PH - Sana Bukas pa ang Kahapon (2014) (US)
plot: The story revolves around two women, who will be united by fate and their hunger to seek truth and justice. Emmanuelle, a feisty lawyer; and Rose, the kindhearted heiress of the Buena Criollo chocolate company, who will be accused of a crime she did not commit.
cast: Bea Alonzo, Paulo Avelino, Albert Martinez, Maricar Reyes, Tonton Gutierrez, Dina Bonnevie, Susan Roces, and Eddie Garcia

name: PH - Love Is Never Gone (2026) (PH)
plot: Teo is a devoted son who dreams of a better life for his family. He falls victim to Yana, a cunning thief known as “Chameleon,” but soon learns she steals out of desperation to care for her sick mother. What begins in anger turns into love, forged through shared loss and sacrifice.  However, Yana’s ties to a crime syndicate lead to betrayal and Teo’s wrongful imprisonment, leaving him convinced she destroyed him. Years later, pardoned and back in the Philippines, Teo tries to rebuild his life, only to discover that Ace Verona’s wife, Gem, is the very image of Yana. As he infiltrates her world seeking justice, he uncovers dangerous secrets about the powerful Verona family and the shocking truth about Gem’s sacrifice to free him. Caught between love, betrayal, and the corruption of a ruthless clan, Teo is forced into a final reckoning where passion, vengeance, and survival collide—proving that love endures even after betrayal.
cast: Joshua Garcia, Ivana Alawi, Jameson Blake, Jane Oineza, Michael De Mesa, Epy Quizon, Dina Bonnevie, Fyang Smith

name: PH - Philippine's Most Shocking Stories (2025)
plot: A 10-episode true crime and documentary series that revisits some of the most unsettling real-life events in Philippine history. It utilizes in-depth retellings, timelines, and witness accounts to shed new light on cases that once dominated national headlines but remained unresolved or faded from public memory. Featured stories include:
cast: Lyza Aquino, MJ Felipe, Jeff Caparas, Jessie Cruzat, and Karen De Guzman.

name: PH - Dyosa (2008) (PH)
plot: Dyosa is a fantasy series that is aired in Philippines by broadcaster ABS-CBN and starred by Anne Curtis, Sam Milby, Zanjoe Marudo and Luis Manzano and was directed by Wenn Deramas.
cast: Anne Curtis, Sam Milby, Luis Manzano, Zanjoe Marudo, Nikki Bacolod, Mickey Ferriols, Jaclyn Jose, Lloyd Samartino
director: Clark Tolon, Myrna Garnace Tagasa, Kay Conlu-Brondial

name: PH - Love Before Sunrise (2023) (PH)
plot: When a chance meeting brings Atom and Stella together, sparks fly and they fall in love. But after encountering challenges along the way, the two separate upon realizing they had found the right love at the wrong time.
cast: Bea Alonzo, Dennis Trillo, Andrea Torres, Sid Lucero, Rodjun Cruz, Vince Maristela, Cheska Fausto

name: PH - Pusong Ligaw (2017) (PH)
plot: Lost Hearts (Pusong Ligaw) is a classic story about friendship, love, and achieving dreams. Two women, Tessa and Marga are bound by a promise to keep their friendship forever. This fictional drama follows them through the disintegration of their friendship, the tragedy in their lives and their children's, and their reconciliation.
cast: Beauty Gonzalez, Sofia Andres, Bianca King, Diego Loyzaga, Enzo Pineda, Raymond Bagatsing, Joem Bascon

name: PH - Sana'y Wala Nang Wakas (2003) (PH)
plot: Sana'y Wala Nang Wakas was a soap aired by ABS-CBN that premiered on May 19, 2003 and ended July 9, 2004. It is a love story of two star-crossed lovers who suffer for their parents’ long forgotten sins. Christian and Ara battle the odd twists and turns of fate in the hopes of protecting a love that withstands the test of time. The series was headlined by Jericho Rosales, Kristine Hermosa, Diether Ocampo and Angelika dela Cruz.
cast: Jericho Rosales, Kristine Hermosa, Gloria Romero, Cherry Pie Picache, Marvin Agustin, Kaye Abad, Kathryn Bernardo, Caridad Sanchez

name: PH - My Father's Wife (2025)
plot: Best friends Gina and Betsy turn into bitter rivals after Gina marries Betsy's boyfriend, Jack (Gerald), to help him with legal status, which leads to a forbidden romance and pregnancy. In a retaliatory move, Betsy marries Gina’s wealthy father, Robert, igniting a scandalous family feud.
cast: Kazel Kinouchi, Gabby Concepcion, Kylie Padilla, Jak Roberto, Arlene Muhlach, and Andre Paras

name: PH - Cain At Abel (2018) (PH)
plot: Separated as children, brothers Daniel and Miguel grow up in different worlds but are reunited years later by their parents.
cast: Dingdong Dantes, Dennis Trillo, Sanya Lopez, Solenn Heussaff, Eddie Gutierrez, Chanda Romero, Dina Bonnevie, Renz Fernandez

name: PH - Unica Hija (2024) (PH)
plot: Even as a child, Christian (Alfred Vargas) was fascinated by science. He is a genius and comes from a rich family so his parents supported him to further develop his knowledge.
cast: Kate Valdez, Katrina Halili, Biboy Ramirez, Mark Herras, Boboy Garrovillo, Bernard Palanca, Maricar De Mesa, Faith da Silva

name: PH - The Rich Man's Daughter (2015) (PH)
plot: Jade Tanchingco was born into a wealthy, traditional Chinese-Filipino family with a high regard for honor and is extremely dedicated to their Chinese traditions. She always believed she would end up married to her boyfriend whom her family approves, David, until she falls in love with a woman, Althea. A strong bond between the two women emerges that will test Jade's commitment to her conservative family and their values.
cast: Glaiza de Castro, Rhian Ramos, Adrian Alandy, Katrina Halili, Mike Tan, Chynna Ortaleza, Sheena Halili, Gloria Romero

name: PH - Senior High (2023) (PH)
plot: A student’s death causes a scandal at the prestigious Northford High. Investigations conclude it was a suicide. The victim’s twin sister thinks otherwise. As she searches for truth, she will unravel secrets that are far more shocking and dangerous.
cast: Andrea Brillantes, Kyle Echarri, Daniela Stranner, Juan Karlos Labajo, Elijah Canlas, Zaijian Jaranilla, Xyriel Manabat, Miggy Jimenez

name: PH - Magpahanggang Wakas (2016) (PH)
cast: Jericho Rosales, Arci Muñoz, John Estrada, Lito Pimentel, Liza Lorena, Ronaldo Valdez, Marco Gumabao, Yen Santos

name: PH - Mars Ravelo's Darna (2022) (PH)
plot: When fragments of a green crystal scatter in the city and turn people into destructive monsters, Narda embraces her destiny as Darna—the mighty protector of the powerful stone from Planet Marte.
cast: Jane De Leon, Joshua Garcia, Janella Salvador, Zaijian Jaranilla, Paolo Gumabao, Rio Locsin, Simon Ibarra, Zeppi Borromeo

name: PH - Hating Kapatid (2025)
plot: The drama follows twins Tyrone and Belle, who were separated at birth and raised in completely different social environments. As they cross paths in adulthood, they navigate a world of rivalry and secrets, unaware of their biological connection.
cast: Carmina Villarroel, Zoren Legaspi, Cassy Legaspi, and Mavy Legaspi

name: PH - Pamilya Sagrado (2023) (PH)
plot: The members of the Sagrado family live to prove they are the most powerful and influential, stopping at nothing to bury dirty secrets to keep their name faultless and sacred.
cast: Piolo Pascual, Kyle Echarri, Grae Fernandez, Tirso Cruz III, John Arcilla, Joel Torre, Mylene Dizon, Rosanna Roces

name: PH - A Secret in Prague (2026) (PH)
plot: In a world where love is rarely simple, two people find themselves drawn to each other despite the expectations and struggles surrounding them. As family ties, personal choices, and difficult circumstances test their bond, they must decide how far they are willing to go to protect what they feel.
cast: Andrea Brillantes, Enrique Gil, Kim Domingo, Cedrick Juan

name: PH - My Guardian Alien (2024) (PH)
plot: An alien disguised as a human woman must protect Earth from an intergalactic threat while hiding her identity from her husband.
cast: Marian Rivera, Gabby Concepcion, Max Collins, Gabby Eigenmann, Raphael Landicho, Kiray Celis, Arnold Reyes, Tart Carlos

name: PH - Bawal Lumabas (2020) (PH)
plot: The story follows Emerald "Eme" Tesoro (Kim Chiu), an overseas worker who returns to the Philippines to reunite with her siblings after years of being away. She soon discovers that her sacrifices have come at a cost: she has become a stranger to her own family.Her youngest sister, Jade (Francine Diaz), has become rebellious and resents Emerald’s strict "Bawal Lumabas" (No going out) rules. In a desperate attempt to bond and monitor her sister, Emerald decides to enroll in the same high school as Jade. However, things get awkward and complicated when Emerald realizes her high school teacher is actually her ex-boyfriend, Jonjon (Rafael Rosell).
cast: Kim Chiu, Francine Diaz, Kyle Echarri, Rafael Rosell, Paulo Angeles, Trina Legaspi, Giselle Sanchez

name: PH - Sins of the Father (2025) (PH)
plot: A self-made man has spent his life building an honest name, desperate to escape his estranged father’s criminal legacy. Now, falsely implicated in his father’s sins, he must fight to prove his innocence before they destroy everything he holds dear.
cast: Gerald Anderson, Jessy Mendiola, Shaina Magdayao, JC de Vera, RK Bagatsing, Francine Diaz, Seth Fedelin, Lotlot De Leon

name: PH - Akusada (2025) (PH)
plot: Akusada follows the intense and thrilling story of a woman named Carolina, whose life becomes intertwined with crime, mystery, and the pursuit of justice. Throughout the series, Carolina seeks answers and navigates the complex web of accusations and deceit that threaten to unravel her life.
cast: Andrea Torres as Carol / Lorena, Benjamin Alves as Wilfred, Lianne Valentin as Roni, Marco Masa as Tristan, Ashley Sarmiento as Amber, Jeniffer Maravilla as Fern, Arnold Reyes as Dennis, Erin Espiritu as Lia, Shyr Valdez as Pilar, Ronnie Liang as Damian, Ahron Villena as Gian, Eunice Lagusad, Max Collins, Sandy Andolong, Tonton Gutierrez, Jo Berry as Lilet Matias

name: PH - Widows' War (2024) (PH)
plot: Best friends Sam and George treat each other as sisters, but later on, their friendship is ruined. Both of them eventually find love, but unbeknownst to the two, they are marrying two men who belong to the same family, the Palacios.
cast: Carla Abellana, Bea Alonzo

name: PH - Sanggang-Dikit FR (2025) (PH)
plot: The story follows Roberta "Bobby" Enriquez, a bubbly and competitive policewoman, and Antonio "Tonyo" Conde, a skilled officer who prefers improvising to following the rules. Both are haunted by personal tragedies. They are forced to work together when a high-profile murder case links their pasts, eventually forming an unbreakable bond while fighting crime.
cast:
Jennylyn Mercado as Roberta "Bobby" Enriquez
Dennis Trillo as Antonio "Tonyo" Conde
Roi Vinzon, Joross Gamboa, Chanty Videla, Sam Pinto, and Allen Dizon
director: L.A. Madridejos and Mark Kevin De Vela

name: PH - Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre (2025) (PH)
plot: Terra, the missing daughter of Danaya, grows up in the human world, unaware of her true heritage. She takes on the role of a superhero before returning to Encantadia to confront a new enemy.
cast: Bianca Umali, Kelvin Miranda, Faith da Silva, Angel Guardian, Rhian Ramos
genre: Sci-Fi & Fantasy / Action & Adventure / Drama / Soap / Family / War & Politics

name: PH - Never Say Die (2026)
plot: The story follows Joey Delgado, a technology expert, who crosses paths with Andrew Dizon, an investigative journalist. Their relationship is complicated from the start—Andrew is the very person who exposed Joey’s father. However, they are forced to form an uneasy alliance to take down a massive conspiracy. Alongside Jin-Ho Lee, a mysterious agent from South Korea, and Joey's best friend Peter, they target Tomas Limjoco, the mastermind behind a powerful drug empire, and the elusive fugitive Liza De Leon
cast: Jillian Ward, David Licauco, Kim Ji-soo, Richard Yap
director: Dominic Zapata (Main), Richard Arellano, Ralfh Manuel Malabunga

name: PH - Replacing Chef Chico (2023) (PH)
plot: When a head chef falls into a coma, it's up to his devoted sous-chef to keep their Filipino fine dining restaurant from closing down.
cast: Alessandra de Rossi, Piolo Pascual, Sam Milby, Joel Saracho, Yesh Anne Burce, Angie Castrence, Paulo Angeles, DMs Boongaling

name: PH - Pulang Araw (2024) (PH)
plot: Red Sun is a family drama that tells stories of courage, sacrifice, and hardships that every Filipino family has. These stories were inspired by the tales of the unsung heroes who defied the odds of World War II and the Japanese occupation of the Philippines.

genre: Action & Adventure / Drama / War & Politics / Family

name: PH - A Family Affair (2022) (PH)
plot: An inheritance from the late matriarch of the Estrellas intertwines the life of Cherry Red with Dave, Paco, Seb, and Drew. Amid the romance that arose between her and two of the four brothers, Cherry's past unravels and exposes deeply buried secrets.
cast: Ivana Alawi, Gerald Anderson, Sam Milby, Jameson Blake, Jake Ejercito

name: PH - Maging Sino Ka Man (2023) (PH)
plot: Maging Sino Ka Man follows two people from two different backgrounds fated to meet and fall for each other. They share a common past that could either build or tear them apart.  Carding is a simple man capable of crossing the line for the sake of his family.

name: PH - Royal Blood (2023) (PH)
plot: Follows the difficult journey of Napoy, an illegitimate son of a business tycoon and a loving single father, who struggles to make ends meet. Everything becomes complicated for Napoy when he becomes the primary suspect in his father's death.

plot: Join the sweet and naïve Aemie as she navigates married life with mafia boss husband Zeke, and the dangerous world she’s about to enter.

plot: The story of a unique family where a Mranaw man marries three different women for various reasons.

plot: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

plot: Wildflower is a Philippine revenge drama television series starring Maja Salvador, together with an ensemble cast. The show originally aired on ABS-CBN, and worldwide on The Filipino Channel, from February 13, 2017 to February 9, 2018.
cast: Maja Salvador, Joseph Marco, Tirso Cruz III, Aiko Melendez, Vin Abrenica, Sunshine Cruz, Zsa Zsa Padilla, RK Bagatsing

genre: Drama / Action & Adventure / Comedy / Mystery / Crime

plot: After discovering Hell University, a group of friends is forced into a lawless school where murder is allowed every night. As fear threatens to break them apart, Zein fights to keep her friends alive while uncovering a system designed to make no one leave.

name: PH - Ang Mutya Ng Section E (2025) (PH)
plot: Jay-jay, the only girl in the mischievous Section E, hopes for a fresh start in high school but quickly becomes the target of her rowdy male classmates' pranks and schemes to make her leave. Dubbed their "Mutya" (muse), she fights back with wit and charm, turning the tables on her tormentors. Amidst the chaos, unexpected friendships blossom, and hilarious misunderstandings lead to heart-fluttering moments. Can Jay-jay survive the madness of Section E, or will she win over their hearts instead?

name: PH - On the Job
plot: The series centres around crime syndicates that temporarily release contracted prison inmates to carry out political assassinations for those in power, except that the crime syndicates are run by politicians. The series also puts a spotlight on the real-world predicament concerning fake news and how easily truth can be manufactured and disseminated to the public in today's age of information.
cast: John Arcilla, Dennis Trillo, Lotlot De Leon, Joel Torre, Gerald Anderson, Piolo Pascual, Christopher de Leon, Rayver Cruz

plot: Students with dark secrets; four stories of high school and college students whispered around campuses. Real or fabricated, it's up to you to discover.
